issues: compute_signal does not handle empty or missing data robustly (e.g. no feed_urls or days_back kwargs passed to fetch_rss_counts)
compute_signal indentation errors (return statements not properly indented)
compute_signal uses latest_date from rss_count data for weeks_held calculation, but spec implies weekly frequency and consistent date handling needed
target_allocations returns empty dict on RISK_OFF (SELL) which is correct, but max_total_exposure of 20% is not enforced anywhere
position sizing logic does not enforce max_total_exposure of 20% as per spec
